title: connector xapi  execute long sql statement through mysql router will cause error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `test_table` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `value` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`));
SELECT * FROM `test_table` WHERE `value` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `created_at` DESC;
key_bug_features: execute long sql statement through mysql router
